# Scrapy

> Scrapy is a fast high-level web crawling and web scraping framework, used
> to crawl websites and extract structured data from their pages. It can be used
> for a wide range of purposes, from data mining to monitoring and automated
> testing.

## Docs

- [Scrapy 2.14 documentation](https://projects.localizethedocs.org/scrapy-docs-l10n/_sources/index.rst.txt)
- [Scrapy at a glance](https://projects.localizethedocs.org/scrapy-docs-l10n/_sources/intro/overview.rst.txt)
- [Examples](https://projects.localizethedocs.org/scrapy-docs-l10n/_sources/intro/examples.rst.txt)
- [Installation guide](https://projects.localizethedocs.org/scrapy-docs-l10n/_sources/intro/install.rst.txt)
